prompt: Create a photorealistic vertical fashion portrait of an adult Japanese woman, early 20s, standing in a dark industrial studio against a stained raw concrete wall with visible seams, bolts, grime, and moody shadows. She has a short chin-length bob haircut with wispy bangs, dark brown, clear natural makeup, large expressive eyes, and a gentle slight smile while looking directly at the camera. Pose her with a relaxed tilted torso and one shoulder dropped, giving a confident casual gravure-style fashion pose. Outfit: an off-shoulder sheer black mesh long-sleeve cropped top layered over a black bandeau, exposing the midriff, paired with oversized dark olive cargo pants, a black double-buckle grommet belt, and a dangling silver chain at the hip. Lighting should be dramatic and directional from the upper left, creating strong highlights on the face and abdomen with deep shadows around the edges. Use realistic skin texture, natural proportions, shallow depth of field, high-detail fabric transparency, cinematic contrast, and a gritty urban editorial mood. No text, no logos, no watermark.
